positive: Symmetrical, high-contrast graphic illustration of a mystical celestial scene: a central mountain silhouette reaching towards a vibrant, geometrically rendered crescent moon. The foreground is filled with stylized bioluminescent flora and stylized constellations marked by geometric lines. Use a vibrant color palette of deep indigo, turquoise, emerald green, and burnt gold. The art style must be Neo-Art Nouveau meets low-poly vector graphics, characterized by clean, bold outlines, flat color blocking, and strong separation between elements, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, dreamlike, highly decorative.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, jpeg artifacts, low detail, amateur, deformed, mutated, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, messy, photorealistic
